calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Dec-16-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for a motion for attorney's fees this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerks: R. Edwards/ M. Chin, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
William Duncan, Esq. for Plaintiff: E.O.C. Ord ; no appearance by defendants

On the basis of evidence received, the motion is granted in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for $4,685.25 in addition to the amount of the judgment entered for plaintiff.
Order granting motion was signed in open court.

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
William Duncan, Esq. for Plaintiff: E.O.C. ORD, Inc.
After hearing the evidence presented and declaration in support, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Madeline O'Leary as follows:
Damages $8,679.67
Attorney's Fees and costs per memo of costs.
Judgment signed in open court.
